zh.Saint Michaels on Wyre, Lancashire, Engl: 英國藍卡爾聖 米可艾爾也斯 奧 維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Huddlestone於1513年出生在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，她的父親John Hudleston17歲，母親Elizabeth Sutton16歲。她於大約1529年與Richard Belgrave在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1583年在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Huddlestone于1513年出生在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，她的父亲John Hudleston17岁，母亲Elizabeth Sutton16岁。她于大约1529年与Richard Belgrave在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1583年在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Huddlestone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Huddleston
meanings: English: habitational name from Huddleston (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Hūdel (genitive Hūdeles; see Huddle ) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Huddlestone was born in 1513, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, her father, John Hudleston, was 17 and her mother, Elizabeth Sutton, was 16. She married Richard Belgrave about 1529, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1583, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Huddlestone est née en 1513, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Hudleston, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sutton, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Belgrave environ 1529, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1583, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1529 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Richard Belgrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1583 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Huddlestoneが1513年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで生まれた時，父John Hudlestonは17歳，母Elizabeth Suttonは16歳であった。約1529年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでRichard Belgraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1583年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Huddlestone(이)가 1513년 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hudleston(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Sutton(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Richard Belgrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Belgrave aproximadamente 1529, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Saint Michaels on Wyre, Lancashire, Engl: ст мачаел'с он вир, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Huddlestone родилась в 1513 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hudleston было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sutton, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Belgrave около 1529 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1583 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Richard Belgrave aproximadamente 1529, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1583, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
